summary:
Reordered the shutdown sequence so the scheduler closes the queue before waiting on the worker goroutine, guaranteeing blocked `Pop` calls unblock cleanly; the worker loop now defers `close(done)` and checks `ctx.Err()` before scheduling more work (`main.go:82`-`main.go:97`). The fix removes the deadlock window during cancellation.

Tests: `./test.sh` → OK: clean shutdown / PASS
